visual_description: The blonde woman in a patterned short‑sleeve blouse and black pants walks into a kitchen‑dining area, holding a purple jacket and a bag. She passes a blue shelving unit and a round wooden table, smiling, while a man with an arm sling and other people sit on a white couch in the background. She turns toward the man in a navy shirt seated on the couch, gesturing with her hand, then faces the man with the arm sling, still smiling.
audio_description: Light laughter and background chatter are audible.
